prompt: Build a premium crypto website inspired by BlockForge - Build & Deploy DeFi Protocols. Keep the page polished, high-trust, and conversion-ready with responsive sections and clear hierarchy.

files.content:
BlockForge
Protocols Features Benefits Pricing
Protocols Features Benefits Pricing
Decentralized Finance

Build DeFi
Without Limits

Deploy smart contract-based financial protocols with BlockForge. Create lending platforms, DEXs, yield farming, and more with enterprise-grade infrastructure and zero intermediaries.

$500B+

Total Value Locked

10K+

Active Protocols

2M+

Daily Users

Popular DeFi Protocols

Powered by BlockForge infrastructure

SynthSwap

DEX with AMM liquidity pools

$45.2B TVL

LendHub

Lending & borrowing protocol

$78.5B TVL

HarvestYield

Yield farming aggregator

$32.1B TVL

InsuranceDAX

Decentralized insurance

$8.9B TVL

Enterprise Protocol Features

Everything needed to launch production-grade DeFi protocols

Smart Contracts

Audited Smart Contracts

Start with battle-tested, audited smart contracts. Solidity templates for DEXs, lending protocols, derivatives, and more. Customize or extend as needed.

  • Multi-chain deployment
  • Gas-optimized code
  • Formal verification ready
Analytics

Real-Time Analytics

Monitor protocol health with comprehensive dashboards. Track TVL, volume, liquidity, user metrics, and more. Real-time alerts for critical events.

  • Live data feeds
  • Risk analytics
  • Governance insights
Security

Security & Compliance

Built-in security measures from day one. Multi-sig treasury, time locks, circuit breakers, and emergency pause mechanisms protect your protocol.

  • Audit trail logging
  • Reentrancy protection
  • Admin permission model

Why Choose BlockForge?

Lightning Fast

Optimized infrastructure for high-throughput protocols. Handle millions of transactions with sub-second latency.

Multi-Chain Ready

Deploy on Ethereum, Polygon, Arbitrum, Optimism, Avalanche, and 10+ other chains from one dashboard.

Community Driven

Access to 50K+ developer ecosystem. Collaborate, learn, and grow with the vibrant DeFi community.

Developer Statistics

25K+

Active Developers

150M+

Total Transactions

99.9%

Uptime SLA

$2.1B

Developer Grants

Flexible Protocol Plans

Scale from testnet to production

Testnet

For development

Free
  • Smart contract templates
  • Testnet deployment
  • Community support
  • API access (limited)
MOST POPULAR

Production

For live protocols

$2,999 /month
  • Everything in Testnet
  • Mainnet deployment
  • Multi-chain support
  • Premium analytics
  • 24/7 technical support

Enterprise

For ecosystems

Custom
  • Everything in Production
  • Custom integrations
  • Dedicated infrastructure
  • Custom audits & SLAs
  • White-glove onboarding

Ready to Build Your DeFi Protocol?

Join thousands of developers building the future of finance
